narrative.company_description: TQ Logistics is being evaluated under the manually selected sector: Logistics and Distribution.
narrative.sector_summary: Sector logic in this report is based on your manual industry input, not automatic website classification.
narrative.ga_jtc_intro: The GA JTC offers a dollar-for-dollar reduction of state income tax liability when creating new jobs in certain areas. Counties are designated Tier 1 through Tier 4, with Military Zones, Less Developed Census Tracts (LDCT), and Opportunity Zones often supporting lower thresholds and larger benefits.
narrative.ga_jtc_note: TQ Logistics Georgia locations with corresponding tier designations and estimated credit benefits are shown below. Final thresholds may be NAICS dependent and should be validated.
narrative.retraining_intro: The GA Retraining Tax Credit can provide up to 50% of eligible retraining costs, including wages of trainees, up to $1,250 per employee per year.
narrative.retraining_context: Below are industry-specific software and equipment categories with applicable programs. If implemented and employees were retrained to use them, these categories may support GA RTC claims.
narrative.rd_intro: Federal and Georgia R&D credits can provide tax relief on qualified technical activities, typically as a percentage of qualified research spend including eligible wages.
narrative.rd_examples_intro: Examples of how TQ Logistics may qualify include:
rd_focus_examples: Warehouse flow redesign and testing for pick/pack optimization.
Route and dispatch algorithm testing to improve delivery performance.
Automation pilots for sortation and inventory accuracy improvements.
narrative.costseg_intro: TQ Logistics may be able to reduce taxes through cost segregation by accelerating depreciation on newly constructed, expanded, or purchased facilities.
narrative.costseg_detail: For operations-heavy facilities, portions such as site improvements, electrical systems, specialized power, fabrication areas, and certain interior improvements may qualify for shorter depreciation lives.
narrative.costseg_bonus: A substantial portion of commercial building basis (net of land) may be accelerated in year one, subject to current bonus depreciation rules and project facts.
narrative.investment_rationale: Georgia Investment Tax Credit is generally targeted to qualifying manufacturing/telecommunications investments; detected industry does not appear to meet this program scope.
